title: poivrea pilosa
intro: Poivrea pilosa, also known as hairy poivre or hairy pepper, is a tropical plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Poivrea pilosa include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Poivrea pilosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
intro_study: According to "Research in pharmaceutical sciences", poivrea pilosa (also known as S. pilifera) benefits include exhibiting potent anti-inflammatory effects by inhibiting lipid peroxidation, membrane stabilization, and leukocyte penetration.
